body:
NEW: Official Inauguration Mug inside. Open now. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccba3IiBAGYIcCHeWga-4wDRMN6aaaaBV4lBMG-E2ea?s=4@09456&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=k&v=&t=y3y6z98klcsistYn8osi8pYxwAgpfAhhaArArAfh8g83&rAr)

Friend,

As part of our Inaugural Collection, we're releasing a brand new mug just in time for January 20.

[**Show you are ready for President-Elect Trump to be sworn into office with the Official Inauguration Mug.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccba3IiBAGYIcCHeWga-4wDRMN6aaaaBV4lBMG-E2ea?s=4@09456&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=l&v=&t=y3y6z98klcsistYn8osi8pYxwAgpfAhhaArArAfh8g83&rAr)

This coffee mug belongs in your kitchen, and will be a conversation starter for years to come.

Pour your favorite coffee into a mug that shows off your support for America's next president.

[**Get your Official Inauguration Mug today.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccba3IiBAGYIcCHeWga-4wDRMN6aaaaBV4lBMG-E2ea?s=4@09456&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=j&v=&t=y3y6z98klcsistYn8osi8pYxwAgpfAhhaArArAfh8g83&rAr)

Alex
Team Trump

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name: tell Congress to protect health care
body:
Our first fight of 2017
---
**Add your name to stand with Democrats to protect our progress and fight for affordable health care.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170104_ew_nd2&source=em_20170104_ew_nd2")**
Here's an important number to remember as Congress heads back to work this week: 65,844,610.

That's the number of Americans who voted for a progressive vision of the future -- that includes keeping and expanding affordable health care. It's also 2.9 million more Americans than the number who voted for the Trump agenda of taking away your health care while paying for tax cuts for the rich.

And yet, starting this week, Paul Ryan and Mitch McConnell are going to hit the ground running on their efforts to repeal Obamacare, even before Donald Trump takes the Oath of Office on January 20th.

They may claim they have a mandate, but this is not what the majority of Americans voted for. **[Add your name if you're one of them and are committed to joining the fight to protect the progress we made under President Obama, especially when it comes to affordable health care.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+if+youre+one+of+them+and+a&utm_campaign=em_20170104_ew_nd2&source=em_20170104_ew_nd2")**

And here's a few other numbers to keep in mind: repealing the Affordable Care Act would cost as many as 30 million Americans their health insurance. A nonpartisan analysis also showed that once the GOP's "repeal" plan goes through and they fail to come up with an actual plan to "replace," nearly 59 million people could be uninsured by 2019 -- a higher uninsured rate than when the ACA was passed in 2010.

Donald Trump campaigned on promises to help the middle class, and right now we're seeing just how empty those promises were. **The GOP's actions are going to do the exact opposite -- but as Democrats we're going to do everything we can to fight back, and that work starts today. Say you're standing with us:**

**[ADD MY NAME](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c16c/4067b0a/23778743f/7e791706/2673175644/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-Health-Care1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+MY+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170104_ew_nd2&source=em_20170104_ew_nd2")**
Thanks,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c16c/4067b0a/23778743f/7e791707/2673175644/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170104_ew_nd2&source=em_20170104_ew_nd2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c16c/4067b0a/23778743f/7e791704/2673175644/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170104_ew_nd2&source=em_20170104_ew_nd2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c16c/4067b0a/23778743f/7e791705/2673175644/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170104_ew_nd2&source=em_20170104_ew_nd2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c16c/4067b0a/23778743f/7e791702/2673175644/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170104_ew_nd2&source=em_20170104_ew_nd2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

That's the number of Americans who voted for a progressive vision of the future -- that includes keeping and expanding affordable health care. They may claim they have a mandate, but this is not what the majority of Americans voted for. "=\(null\&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utmmedium=email&utmsource=dnc&utmcontent=2+-+Add+your+name+if+youre+one+of+them+and+a&utmcampaign=em20170104ewnd2&source=em20170104ewnd2") And here's a few other numbers to keep in mind: repealing the Affordable Care Act would cost as many as 30 million Americans their health insurance. name: 2017 Governor's Inauguration Committee
subject: Register this week for the Inauguration of Governor-Elect Carney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4676451651349905408)
---

The honor of your presence is requested at:
the Inauguration of
**Governor**
_John C. Carney_
and
**Lieutenant Governor**
_Bethany A. Hall-Long_

Please [register](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4748509245387833344?ref=ebtn) below for the following events:

**Celebration of the Arts in Delaware**

Saturday, January 14, 2017, 7:00 p.m.
Clear Space Theatre
20 Baltimore Avenue, Rehoboth Beach, DE
Please bring a non-perishable good with you. All contributions will be donated to feed the hungry in Sussex County.
**_S_ _OLD OUT_**
_(Please contact us at (302) 395-0707 to discuss the possibility of a waitlist.)_

Sunday, January 15, 2017, 7:00 p.m.
P.S. DuPont Middle School Auditorium
701 W. 34th Street, Wilmington, DE
Please bring a children's book with you. All contributions will be donated to the United Way of Delaware's "My Very Own Library" Program,
designed to build home libraries for elementary students in our community to promote reading literacy.
[_Free admission, preregistration required_](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4748509245387833344?ref=ebtn)

**Interfaith Prayer Service**
**Tuesday, January 17, 2017, 9:00 a.m.**
Whatcoat United Methodist Church
341 Saulsbury Road, Dover, DE

**Inauguration Ceremony**
Tuesday, January 17, 2017, 11:00 a.m.
Legislative Mall, Dover, Delaware
_Open to the public_

**Public Greeting**
Following the Inauguration Ceremony
Legislative Hall, Dover, DE

**Inauguration Celebration**
Tuesday, January 17, 2017, 7:00 p.m
The Rollins Center at Dover Downs
1131 North DuPont Highway, Dover, DE
_$35/person ([click here to RSVP and register](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4748509245387833344?ref=ebtn))_

[Advanced registration for ALL events is required by January 9, 2017.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4748509245387833344?ref=ebtn)

To [RSVP and register](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4748509245387833344?ref=ebtn) for the inaugural events, and for more information about the inauguration, please visit [johncarney.org/inauguration](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4820566839425761280).

Thank you for your support, and we look forward to seeing you at these events!

Sincerely,

2017 Governor's Inauguration Committee

| Paid for by Friends for John Carney
---
Friends for John Carney
19 E Commons Blvd
2nd Floor
New Castle DE 19720 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8398667792659775488/4604394057311977472).

name: ADD YOUR NAME (via DSCC)
subject: JUST IN: 5 NEW Democratic Senators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Five progressive champions who you worked to elect were just sworn in as Senators. Please join your fellow grassroots Democrats in welcoming them. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed0d/2b07114c/41c16e94/73680688/75705528/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-our-new-senators?source=PT-20170104-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")
---
Friend, five progressive champions you helped elect - Kamala Harris, Tammy Duckworth, Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, and Chris Van Hollen - were just officially sworn in as United States Senators.

Beyond making the 115th Congress more progressive, they also make it the most diverse Senate in history -- adding four women and three people of color.

[**Friend, will you add your name to welcome our new Democratic senators and stand with them in the battles ahead?**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed0d/2b07114c/41c16e94/73680688/75705528/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-our-new-senators?source=PT-20170104-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed0d/2b07114c/41c16e94/73680688/75705528/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-our-new-senators?source=PT-20170104-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")
---

The months ahead will bring tough battles against Donald Trump and a Republican Senate that prioritizes repealing Obamacare, gutting Social Security, and ending Medicare as we know it.

But thanks to your grassroots work, there are new senators who will be taking the GOP to task and fighting for everything we believe in. Protecting our progress won't be easy, but with these five in the Senate and Democrats everywhere supporting them, we'll succeed.

[**Friend, please add your name to welcome our new Democratic Senators and make it clear that we 're standing with them in the days ahead >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed0d/2b07114c/41c16e94/73680688/75705528/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-our-new-senators?source=PT-20170104-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

Thank you,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170104-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed0d/2b07114c/41c16e94/7368068a/75705528/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed0d/2b07114c/41c16e94/73680685/75705528/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed0d/2b07114c/41c16e94/73680684/75705528/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
clean_body: Five progressive champions who you worked to elect were just sworn in as Senators. Please join your fellow grassroots Democrats in welcoming them. "" Friend, five progressive champions you helped elect - Kamala Harris, Tammy Duckworth, Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, and Chris Van Hollen - were just officially sworn in as United States Senators. Beyond making the 115th Congress more progressive, they also make it the most diverse Senate in history -- adding four women and three people of color. "" | "" The months ahead will bring tough battles against Donald Trump and a Republican Senate that prioritizes repealing Obamacare, gutting Social Security, and ending Medicare as we know it. But thanks to your grassroots work, there are new senators who will be taking the GOP to task and fighting for everything we believe in. Protecting our progress won't be easy, but with these five in the Senate and Democrats everywhere supporting them, we'll succeed. "" Thank you, Team DSCC A quick note on donations, Friend: We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts. Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Christine Harbin
subject: Now is the time
body:
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=a2ca35fa4274fb3d818569322c03bae7eb2a0d5e5369491f543f301bdf573ad0c0f208d968170428c1b5ce02b922a9da656dd23162909dc172aef71885acd628dd11a9cddb084ce1)
---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=17226be0a5997a1b07d502b6e5eb508934862a78aa11ec60e2e923737f60d07736941b2401d57700)
---
| | Hi Peter,

For years, our lawmakers in Congress have vowed to get rid of Obamacare. Now, they have their best chance yet to make good on their word.

Barack Obama's signature health-care law has failed to deliver on its promises, and continues to leave Americans with cancelled insurance plans, reduced access to doctors, and premium increases in the double digits-or worse.[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=17226be0a5997a1bb4591644b944e3468ac2c3a540f570136ab64fee4eaae098bea1f80723f9465f)
Using a process called budget reconciliation, Obamacare's opponents in our new Senate can repeal large portions of the law with a simple majority, while leaving no possibility of a filibuster by lawmakers who want to keep it. Then, the resolution would just need to be passed in the House of Representatives and signed by President Trump after he takes office.

We can't let our lawmakers pass up this opportunity to turn back years of terrible policy and free Americans from Obamacare's burdensome mandates and costs._[Click here to send a message](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=17226be0a5997a1bd37b752664eacffacda822fdea8c0b92f914b9c6a9282f4c2131832eaa52ffe9 "Click here to send a message")_ to your members of Congress telling them there's no better time than now to act on their campaign promises!

For Freedom,Chrissy Harbin
Director of Federal Affairs and Strategic Initiatives
Americans for Prosperity ****
---

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com **
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=17226be0a5997a1baffd8775525130727d16d59c30cc972244dc4ff0bb048bb60a13c775230d64c7) Americans For Prosperity Foundation 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201 ******[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c7
54b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=
003i00000262AbVAAU)******
clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi Peter, For years, our lawmakers in Congress have vowed to get rid of Obamacare. Now, they have their best chance yet to make good on their word. Barack Obama's signature health-care law has failed to deliver on its promises, and continues to leave Americans with cancelled insurance plans, reduced access to doctors, and premium increases in the double digits-or worse. Using a process called budget reconciliation, Obamacare's opponents in our new Senate can repeal large portions of the law with a simple majority, while leaving no possibility of a filibuster by lawmakers who want to keep it. Then, the resolution would just need to be passed in the House of Representatives and signed by President Trump after he takes office. We can't let our lawmakers pass up this opportunity to turn back years of terrible policy and free Americans from Obamacare's burdensome mandates and costs. "Click here to send a message" to your members of Congress telling them there's no better time than now to act on their campaign promises! For Freedom,Chrissy Harbin Director of Federal Affairs and Strategic Initiatives Americans for Prosperity **

body:

Friend,

With Inauguration Day just weeks away, we've launched an Inaugural Collection of special-edition merchandise to commemorate this historic day in American history.

A best seller among the Inaugural Collection is a set of two Made-in-America 16-ounce pint glasses decorated with a special seal honoring the 45th president.

[**Get your Official Inauguration Pint Glass Set now to celebrate the swearing in of President-Elect Trump.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba3KcQGRCxCHgWga11hDRMN6aaaaBZYoBMG0FYla?m=9@uFxDx&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=r&p=&z=s9sAtC2qfimomzSt2xavlGkmlGvGavZGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

Cheers to America's next president in your very own Official Inauguration Pint Glass.

[**Get your Official Inauguration Pint Glass Set today to get in time for January 20th.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eciba3KcQGRCxCHgWga11hDRMN6aaaaBZYoBMG0FYla?m=9@uFxDx&m=Vxoqdta0yD_YuSqd.kgu&d=p&p=&z=s9sAtC2qfimomzSt2xavlGkmlGvGavZGbnUGlGlGZn2m29&lGl)

Alex
Trump Store Manager
